name: L B S South LLC
principals: Mike Leonard (President); Mike McCullough (Manager, Davie location)
service_types: school bus dealer/distributor (IC Bus brand) - NOT an operating contractor
districts_or_customers: Sells/services IC Bus school buses to Florida school districts and private contractors statewide
recent_news: LBS South acquired IC Bus distribution rights for Florida (2012); subsidiary of Leonard Bus Sales of upstate NY; Davie FL address is a satellite sales/service location
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. LBS South is a school bus dealer/distributor (IC Bus brand) owned by Leonard Bus Sales, not an operating student-transportation contractor. Disqualify from Summit pipeline.

name: Buscorp Inc
principals: Randy Armes (President per record; LinkedIn lists Buscorp Inc experience but Armes is shown based in Washington state, suggesting a dormant or out-of-state-managed FL entity)
service_types: unclear; no operating website or marketing footprint found; record suggests school-bus-related but no active service evidence
districts_or_customers: None identified; no public contracts or district relationships found in Lee County or elsewhere
recent_news: No public news. Website (buscorpinc.com) does not resolve. No Florida Sunbiz detail surfaced in search. Single-employee record with $42K revenue estimate consistent with a shell/dormant entity.
fit_notes: Likely not a viable tuck-in. Appears to be a single-person/shell entity in Cape Coral with no operating website, no marketing presence, and no identifiable district contracts. De-prioritize unless local diligence confirms an active fleet.

name: Corporate Coach
service_types: charter / motorcoach / corporate shuttle / wedding / airport - NOT a school bus contractor; no special-needs student transport evidence despite source-record flag
districts_or_customers: Corporate clients, weddings, airport groups across IL, southern WI, northern IN; no school-district contracts identified
recent_news: BBB-listed (A+); started locally 2007, LLC formed 11/12/2009. Member Des Plaines Chamber of Commerce. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in fit. Corporate Coach is a charter/motorcoach operator (corporate shuttles, weddings, airport), not a school or special-needs student transportation contractor. Outside Summit's K-12 home-to-school focus.

name: AM/PM 24 Hr Transportation
service_types: expedited freight / car hauling / general 24-hour transportation - NOT student transportation; website tagline is 'Full Service Expedited Shipping'
districts_or_customers: None identified in K-12; appears to be freight/courier customers
recent_news: No M&A or notable news. Multiple AM/PM-branded transportation entities in Chicago (AM/PM Premium Car Carrier since 1976, AMPM Express freight) suggest the brand is firmly in freight/auto-transport, not student transport.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. This is an expedited freight/shipping company, not a school or special-needs student transportation contractor. Disqualify from Summit pipeline.

name: Five Star Limo Svc
service_types: limousine / sedan / shuttle bus (up to ~32-pax) - general livery; no confirmed school or special-needs student transportation service offering
districts_or_customers: No school-district contracts identified; appears to be general consumer/corporate livery in the Twin Cities
recent_news: No M&A or notable news. Listed as public transport / truck-and-railroad transportation in MN business directories. 1-10 employees.
website: fivestarslimo.com (5starslimo.com is an unrelated CA limo company)
fit_notes: Weak/likely-not-a-fit. Profile suggests general limo/shuttle livery rather than K-12 home-to-school or special-needs student transport. Only worth a call if Summit is specifically hunting MN SPED/NEMT operators; otherwise de-prioritize.
